title: leonotis nepetifolia var. nepetifolia
intro: Leonotis nepetifolia var. nepetifolia, also known as Mountain Catchfly or Lion's Tail, is a perennial herb native to South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Leonotis nepetifolia var. nepetifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or as a dried herb for added flavor in soups and stews.
